subject: OneDrive sync stuck on 'Processing changes'
description: OneDrive cloud icon shows syncing forever; files not updating for collaborators.

ts_steps.title: Pause and resume
ts_steps.action: OneDrive tray — Pause syncing 2 min → Resume; confirm free disk space on PC.

ts_steps.title: Reset OneDrive
ts_steps.action: Run %localappdata%\Microsoft\OneDrive\onedrive.exe /reset — relinks after reboot per MS doc.

ts_steps.title: Unlink and relink
ts_steps.action: OneDrive Settings — unlink PC, sign in again; choose folders to sync selectively if large library.

internal_information: Long path, locked file, or corrupt cache. Path length >260 pre-Win10 long path fix. Known folder backup conflicts.
